goal: Replace the synth-delta in the V4 RL loop with the REAL trained-weight delta from the megatron 1-layer training iteration, so the rollout->update->re-rollout loop is driven by actual training (reduced-layer basis). Cold-drives the new /task-dag-planner skill.

nodes.title: Export real trained attn-weight delta from the megatron training-iteration driver
nodes.verify: torch.load the .pt; assert 5 keys present, each finite, and at least one has nonzero L2 delta vs pre-step snapshot (proves AdamW actually moved weights)

nodes.title: Build megatron->sglang weight-name remap for the 5 attn tensors
nodes.verify: for each of the 5 sglang names (model.layers.0.self_attn.*), the map yields a megatron source name + a shape-checked transform; unit-asserted on the exported tensor shapes from n1

nodes.title: Run RL loop feeding the REAL remapped delta via update_weights_from_tensor (replace synth)
nodes.verify: EXIT=0; update_weights_from_tensor returns (True,Success); re-rollout output diverges from step0 AND the delta applied equals the real trained delta (not a synth perturbation) — assert by hashing the pushed tensors against trained_attn_delta.pt
